notes: v0.2.19: Pre-connect input meter + no-signal banner. (1) Live input meter on the Setup screen — pick your mic and channel, watch the meter, and confirm signal is flowing before committing to a session. Shows a dB readout with color bands (green / yellow / red) and a 'No signal' hint when silent. (2) After connecting, if the mic input stays silent (below -60 dB) for 3 seconds, a dismissible banner appears pointing you at channel selection, mic mute, and Windows microphone privacy. Both features exist to catch the #1 onboarding failure: user picked the wrong input device or channel.
